base_uri.description: Base URI path for the application. Must start with '/'. Example: '/ej' serves the app at localhost:PORT/ej/...

prod_dcd_ssh_srv.description: SSH host (alias from ~/.ssh/config or user@host) of the production docker-compose deployment server. Used by the generated bin/prod-* scripts.

prod_base_port.description: Base port for the production deployment. Services are exposed at fixed offsets (same mechanism as dev): frontend at +0, Supabase API (Kong) at +40, Postgres at +41 (loopback only).

prod_versioning.description: Production versioning policy. 'dev' rebuilds database and storage on every mutable deployment; 'git-tag' creates per-model releases from local Git tags.

prod_origin.description: Optional public production origin, including scheme and host but no path (e.g. 'https://www.example.com'). When set, production auth redirects and public API URLs use this origin plus base_uri instead of the direct host:port URL.

prod_smtp_server.description: Optional production SMTP host override. When set, it replaces system.smtp.host for production docker-compose generation. Use 127.0.0.1 or localhost to reach a mailer on the Docker host via host-gateway.

prod_smtp_port.description: Optional production SMTP port override. When set, it replaces system.smtp.port for production docker-compose generation.

prod_smtp_from.description: Optional production SMTP sender address override. When set, it replaces system.smtp.from_email for production docker-compose generation.

proxy.description: Marks this model as a 'proxy' kind: instead of an app (concepts/security/...), it deploys a Caddy container that terminates HTTPS for 'domain', serves a static landing page (index.md) and reverse-proxies the listed app models by their base_uri. A model with a 'proxy' section must not contain concepts.jsonc or any other app source file.

domain.description: Public hostname served over HTTPS (e.g. 'www.unibizkit.dev'). The TLS certificate is obtained via ACME TLS-ALPN-01 (only port 443 needs to be reachable).

acme_email.description: Optional email for the ACME (Let's Encrypt) account.

html_head_title.description: Text used as the <title> of the proxy landing page.

models.description: Directory names of app models under models/ to reverse-proxy. Each is proxied at its own base_uri (read from that model's deployment.jsonc). base_uris and prod_base_ports must be unique among them.
